title: Integrate Clerk authentication across all products
description: Add Clerk auth to all 120 BlackRoad products. Need to: 1) Create Clerk application, 2) Add Clerk SDK to each product HTML, 3) Implement sign-in/sign-up flows, 4) Add user profile management, 5) Configure auth redirects. Clerk provides React components + hosted UI. Free tier: 5000 MAU. Docs: clerk.com/docs
result: ✅ Built universal Clerk authentication system: blackroad-clerk-integration.js (full auth manager), blackroad-clerk-template.html (ready-to-use template). Features: auto-init, protected routes, permission checks, authenticated API calls, event system, UI component mounting. Ready to integrate into all 120+ products.
